近期Achievements
-The first artist to debut the lead single inside the top 10 of BB100 with first five albums
-Joins Beyoncé as the only female artist to chart all the tracks of the album simultaneously in a week
-First artist to chart all the tracks of the album simultaneously in the second week
-First female artist to have three albums with over 3.6 billion streams in Spotify history (My Everything, Dangerous Woman and thank u, next)
-4th most-viewed MV in the first 24 hours (thank u, next - 55.4M)
-First act to top #1, 2 & 3 spots on BB100 since The Beatles in 1964

-Billboard named Ari “Woman of the Year” in 2018

-6/10 spots of biggest debuts by female artist on global Spotify (updated to 20190914)

-Most people followed on Instagram (169M)
-The most followed woman combined on all streaming platforms

-《時代雜誌》(TIME) 稱Ari為「最具網絡影響力」之一
-NASA都比Ari嘅威力嚇親

Fun fact about "Rain On Me"

1. It is the first female collaboration to debut atop the chart.

2. Ariana is now the artist with the most #1 debuts in Hot 100 history.

3. Ariana now earns the shortest span of #1 debuts on Hot 100 ever (14 days).

4. She is now the first artist in history to have her first four #1's debuting at #1 on the Billboard Hot 100.

5. She has at least one No.1 debut on the Hot 100 for three consecutive years. She is the first artist in HISTORY to achieve this (2018: thank u, next ; 2019: 7 rings ; 2020: Stuck with U & Rain On Me).

6. The song sold 281,400 units in the US in its first week being 72,000 pure sales and 31.4 million streams. It's one of the biggest debut week of the song in 2020.
